---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. (e.g. "I need to do X but currently have to work around it by...")

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of the feature you want.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've already tried.

**Additional context**
Any other context, sketches, or examples.
